name: Suspicious Number of Virtual Machines Created
notes:
This rule triggers when a high number of virtual machines is created in a short period of time. This can show a malicious user behaviour.

Note: If authorized users perform this action often, exclude them by adding in a rule condition.
Please see "Suspicious Number of Modifications Made on Virtual Machines" for an example.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization, BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Created
when at least 200 events are seen with the same Username and different Machine Identifier (custom) in 30 minutes
thresholds: when at least 200 events are seen with the same Username and different Machine Identifier (custom) in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Number of Virtual Machines Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization, BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Created
AND when at least 200 events are seen with the same Username and different Machine Identifier (custom) in 30 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Number of Virtual Machines Created
Event description: High rate of virtual machines creation in a short period of time (e.g. 200 machines created in 30 minutes).
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
